checks.description: After reset is released, the output 'out' must become the LSB‑only one‑hot pattern 0000_0001 within two clock cycles.
checks.pass_condition: The observed value of out equals 8'b0000_0001 at any sample taken within the bounded window after reset release.
checks.trigger_condition: When reset transitions from asserted to deasserted.

checks.description: During normal operation, successive clock edges must rotate the single high bit of 'out' by exactly one position, preserving the one‑hot property.
checks.pass_condition: For any two consecutive samples taken on successive clock edges, the high‑bit position in out must shift left by one (wrapping from MSB to LSB).
checks.trigger_condition: On each rising edge of clk after reset has been released.

checks.description: The output 'out' must always be one‑hot (exactly one bit high) throughout simulation.
checks.pass_condition: At every sampled time point, the reduction XOR of out must be 1 and the reduction OR of out must equal the reduction XOR (i.e., exactly one bit is 1).
checks.trigger_condition: Continuously throughout the simulation after reset deassertion.
